instruction: Create a web page that lists out the top five programming languages by market share and their respective features.
output:
Programming Languages by Market Share
Programming Language Market Share Features
Java 27.2% Platform independence, wide support from the development community, good scalability
C 15.2% Widely used among developers, efficiency, well-used in embedded systems
C++ 9.2% Object-oriented features, used in various industries, platform independent
Python 8.2% Easy to learn and use, dynamic programming language, good scalability
C# 7.4% Object-oriented, popular for enterprise development, reliable memory management
